---
title: "Lab 3 — Drafting a Report with AI"
---

# Lab 3 — Drafting a Report with AI

**Read first:** Chapters 8–9 (Reports; Ideas for a Good Report).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_03.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
